context.projectOverview: agent-bober Phase 3, Sprint 4 of 5. Mine the fail→pass signal the generator-evaluator retry loop discards. Extend the EXISTING pure distill() (src/orchestrator/memory/distill.ts) to detect a sprint whose iterationHistory shows fail(s) then a pass, and emit a new 'fix-contrast' lesson category. Fully deterministic — no LLM, no clock, no fs, no git inside the pure fn. Small surface: distill.ts + distill.test.ts only.

completedSprints.title: Lesson hygiene
completedSprints.summary: retrieve.ts now occurrence-weighted; hygiene.ts pruneLessons; memory.ts quarantinePath + rewriteIndexForQuarantine; `memory prune` CLI. distill.ts was NOT touched.

decisionsLocked.Q4: A — offline deterministic. Extend the pure distill() to mine fail→pass transitions; NO LLM.
decisionsLocked.purityHardConstraint: distill.ts MUST NOT import from ../providers, MUST NOT call Date.now()/new Date(), MUST NOT do fs/network/git inside the pure fn. createdAt stays SENTINEL_CREATED_AT, stamped by the CLI. Repeated calls on identical input → byte-identical output (sorted by lessonId).
decisionsLocked.extendNotFork: Add a FOURTH signal alongside the existing (a) failed-criterion, (b) failing-strategy, (c) rework signals — reuse upsertGroup/lessonIdFromSignature/severityFor. Do NOT create a parallel distiller path. Existing signals must keep producing their lessons (no regression).

principles: Read .bober/principles.md. Gates: TS strict (zero errors), ESLint consistent-type-imports (`import type`), ESM .js specifiers, no `any` unjustified, section comments, deterministic/byte-stable output, conventional commit `bober(sprint-4): ...`. The distill purity discipline is the load-bearing constraint here.
